languages.text: "Я требую объяснений, Эоганн. Зачем ты надругался над этими телами?"
"I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"
languages.original_text: "Я требую объяснений, Эоганн. Зачем ты надругался над этими телами?"

traits.locale_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"
"I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"
"I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

languages.text: 「説明を求める。エオガン。なぜこれらの体を虐待したのか？」
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: 「説明を求める。エオグン。なぜこれらの体を虐待したのか？」

languages.text: “给我个解释，伊奥贡。你为何如此亵渎这些尸体？”
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: “给我个解释，伊奥贡。你为何如此亵渎这些尸体？”

languages.text: «Exijo una explicación, Eogunn. ¿Por qué ha abusado de estos cuerpos?».
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: «Exijo una explicación, Eogunn. ¿Por qué ha abusado de estos cuerpos?».

languages.text: "Ich verlange eine Erklärung, Eogunn. Warum habt Ihr diese Körper verstümmelt?"
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich verlange eine Erklärung, Eogunn. Warum habt Ihr diese Körper verstümmelt?"

languages.text: « J'exige des explications, Eogunn. Pourquoi avez-vous mutilé ces hommes ainsi ? »
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: « J'exige des explications, Eogunn. Pourquoi avez-vous mutilé ces hommes ainsi ? »

languages.text: "Açıklama talep ediyorum Eogunn. Neden bu bedenleri istismar ettiniz?"
languages.original_text: "I demand an explanation, Eogunn. Why have you abused these bodies?"

traits.locale_text: "Açıklama talep ediyorum Eogunn. Neden bu bedenleri istismar ettiniz?"
